---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---
```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)

il_counties <- readRDS("data/il_counties.rds")
```

```{r static plot,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=8}

step_cols <- viridisLite::viridis(5, option = "viridis", direction = -1)

p <- il_counties |> 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = turnout_rate), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
scale_fill_stepsn(
  colors = step_cols,
  limits = c(0.48, 0.78),
  breaks = c(0.48, 0.54, 0.60, 0.66, 0.72, 0.78),
  labels = c("48%", "54%", "60%", "66%", "72%", "78%"),
  name = NULL,
  guide = guide_colorsteps(
    direction = "horizontal",
    even.steps = TRUE,
    label.position = "bottom",
    barwidth = unit(9, "cm"),
    barheight = unit(0.4, "cm")
  )
) +
  coord_sf(datum = NA) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10),
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.key.width  = unit(1.4, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.35, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(0, "pt")
  ) 
ggsave("IL_Static.png", p,  bg="#faf9f6")

```
